$comment: vibe flow state machine. Static source of truth for the flow. States are compound <flow>.<phase> keys. caveman is FROZEN per state (byte-stable across turns). Under D12 the per-turn orders are NOT stored here: skill-owning states carry inject:null and the orders live in the linked vibe-* skill's `## Orders (D12)` section (a <!-- vibe:orders:<state> --> block), resolved by .agents/skills/vibe/scripts/orders.sh. Only `idle` keeps an inline inject (skill-less fallback). The orders block is byte-stable; only <feature> interpolates, so the per-turn inject stays prompt-cache safe. set-state.sh is the only sanctioned writer of state.json.

gates.feature.plan>feature.impl: human approves plan units + picks impl mode

caveman_levels.lite: No filler or hedging; full sentences. Use for strategy, setup, design, compound, amend.
caveman_levels.full: Drop articles; fragments OK; short synonyms. Working default. Use for impl, verify, quick.*.
caveman_levels.ultra: Abbreviate prose; X -> Y arrows; one word where one does. Compound receipts and subagent->orchestrator summaries only. NEVER triage.

safety_carveouts: Security warnings and irreversible-action confirmations stay in normal prose at every caveman level.
Caveman is output compression only; it never reduces reasoning depth. Code, paths, commands stay byte-exact.

idle.inject: state=idle · no active flow · run vibe (setup|strategy|feature|quick) · next: setup.detect | strategy.brainstorm | feature.design | quick.triage
idle.exit: user has named the work; agent has chosen a flow and called set-state.sh

setup.detect.exit: audit complete: missing/present harness pieces listed, plugin preflight run

setup.apply.exit: instructions block present, .agents/skills/vibe scaffolded, lessons.md exists, never clobbered user content

strategy.brainstorm.exit: direction is clear enough to write into root specs

strategy.spec.exit: root specs updated and validated; skip to idle unless a durable lesson surfaced

strategy.compound.exit: lesson recorded with Tags; active-rules digest regenerated

feature.design.exit: feature product.md + tech.md written; design.md when full rigor; approach chosen

feature.plan.exit: plan.md has stable unit IDs; human approved moving to impl

feature.impl.exit: plan units implemented with tests that cite their unit IDs and pass

feature.verify.exit: evidence shows plan units satisfied; review clean; human approved shipping

feature.compound.exit: lesson recorded; cross-cutting decisions promoted; feature archived; digest regenerated

quick.triage.exit: root cause identified; fix is small and bounded (else escalate to feature)

quick.fix.exit: fix implemented with a test that reproduces and resolves the issue

quick.verify.exit: evidence shows fix works and regressions clear

quick.compound.exit: lesson recorded with Tags (or skipped); digest regenerated

writes: targeted .spec edits only (target state's write surface)
amend.exit: scope edit applied; returned to the originating state
